allow: PowerShell($token = "e62b3584fbf8f20c9224db46933c97df27ceb13080cbc4868f9b6f0c22fe"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://platform.acceptatie.centraalregistertechniek.nl/api/rest/crt/v1/organizationQualification?limit=5" -Method GET -Headers $headers; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 } catch { $_.Exception.Message; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
